## Testing Improvement

**What testing aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of testing improvement?**
- [ ] Unit test coverage
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] End-to-end tests
- [ ] Performance tests
- [ ] Accessibility tests
- [ ] Cross-browser tests
- [ ] Mobile tests
- [ ] Visual regression tests
- [ ] Load testing
- [ ] Security testing
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this testing element located?**
- [ ] Component tests
- [ ] Service tests
- [ ] Route tests
- [ ] Utility function tests
- [ ] E2E scenarios
- [ ] Global testing
- [ ] Test infrastructure
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Test data management
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current testing implementation**
Describe what's currently implemented for testing.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**Testing tools used (if any)**
- [ ] Jasmine
- [ ] Karma
- [ ] Cypress
- [ ] Playwright
- [ ] Jest
- [ ] Testing Library
- [ ] Selenium
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Testing metrics**
- Current coverage: [e.g. 75%]
- Number of tests: [e.g. 45]
- Test execution time: [e.g. 2.5s]
- Flaky tests: [e.g. 2]

**Expected impact**
How will this improvement enhance testing?

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (testing gaps)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (moderate enhancement)
- [ ] Low (minor optimization)

**Implementation effort**
- [ ] Low (quick to implement)
- [ ] Medium (moderate effort)
- [ ] High (significant effort)
- [ ] Very high (major undertaking)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the testing improvement here.

**Note**: Better testing leads to more reliable code!

**Note**: Comprehensive testing reduces bugs and improves code quality!

**Note**: Start with critical paths and expand coverage gradually!

**Note**: Automated testing saves time in the long run!
